howItWorks.title: From zero to your crew in 5 minutes
howItWorks.subtitle: Three steps. No installation. No hassle.

step1.title: SUBSCRIBE
step1.description: Choose your plan and create your account with a 7-day trial. No card, no commitment.

step2.title: CONFIGURE
step2.description: Connect your preferred AI (OpenAI, Claude, Gemini) or use ours. Customize name, personality, and channels.

step3.title: COMMAND
step3.description: Talk to your agents via Telegram, WhatsApp, Teams, or directly on the dashboard. They're ready.

teamwork.title: Teamwork
teamwork.description: Your agents collaborate with each other using task boards and delegation.

byok.title: Your key, your control
byok.description: Bring your API key (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google) or use our included provider. No vendor lock-in.

channels.title: Where you already are
channels.description: Telegram, WhatsApp, Teams, Slack, Discord, or web dashboard.

whitelabel.title: Your brand, your look
whitelabel.description: Logo, colors, custom domain. Your clients see your brand.

learning.title: Gets smarter
learning.description: Every conversation teaches something new. The agent adapts tone, preferences, and expertise.

plugins.title: Expand without limits
plugins.description: Plugins for CRM, finance, calendar, proposals, and more.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before getting started.

whatIs.question: What is ARGO?
whatIs.answer: ARGO is a platform that gives every professional a team of specialized AI agents: strategy, operations, research, data, legal, and engineering.

coding.question: Do I need to know how to code?
coding.answer: No. Setup takes 5 minutes and is 100% visual. You talk to your agents just like you would with a colleague.

byok.question: What is BYOK?
byok.answer: BYOK stands for Bring Your Own Key. You connect your OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, or other provider account. Control costs and choose the model.

security.question: Is my data secure?
security.answer: Yes. AES-256-GCM encryption, PCI DSS authentication, LGPD compliant. Data isolated per company.

cancel.question: Can I cancel anytime?
cancel.answer: Yes, no penalty and no red tape. Cancel directly from the dashboard.

trial.question: Does the trial require a credit card?
trial.answer: No. 7 free days without a card. We only ask for payment when you decide to continue.

whitelabel.question: How does white-label work?
whitelabel.answer: On Pro: logo and colors. On Enterprise: custom domain and personalized email.

languages.question: Do the agents speak English?
languages.answer: Yes! 8 languages: pt-BR, en-US, es-ES, fr-FR, it-IT, de-DE, vi, zh.

ctaBanner.title: Ready to build your crew?
ctaBanner.subtitle: 7 free days. No credit card. No hassle.

checkout.title: Build your crew
checkout.subtitle: 7 free days. No credit card. Cancel anytime.

terms.prefix: By continuing, you agree to the
terms.afterTrial: After the trial, you will be charged US$ {monthlyPrice}/mo{totalPrice, plural, =0 {} other { (US$ {totalPrice} every {months} months)}}.

billing.a: You start with a 7-day free trial. After the trial, billing is automatic on your credit card for the chosen period (monthly, semiannual, annual, or biennial). The longer the commitment, the bigger the discount — up to 20% on the biennial plan.

upgrade.a: Yes. You can change your plan at any time in the payment settings. On upgrade, the amount is adjusted proportionally (pro rata). On downgrade, the change takes effect in the next billing cycle.

cancel.a: Yes. There is no cancellation fee. Your access continues until the end of the paid period. After cancellation, your data is retained for 30 days for possible reactivation.

taxes.a: Prices shown do not include applicable taxes or fees (such as VAT or sales tax), unless explicitly stated. The final amount will be calculated at the payment step based on your location.

limits.q: What happens if I exceed the plan limits?
limits.a: You receive a notification when you reach 80% of capacity. When the limit is reached, new agents cannot be created. We recommend upgrading — no data or settings lost.

infrastructure.a: ARGO runs on Google Cloud infrastructure with KVM (Kernel-based Virtual Machine) virtualization. On the Starter plan, your environment shares resources with container isolation. On Pro, you get a dedicated container (2 vCPU, 4 GB RAM). On Enterprise, a dedicated KVM with exclusive resources.

security.a: Yes. AES-256-GCM encryption for data at rest, TLS 1.3 in transit. API keys (BYOK) are encrypted and never exposed in logs. LGPD and SOC 2 compliance (in progress).

checkout.taxDisclaimer: Prices shown do not include applicable taxes or fees (such as VAT or sales tax), unless explicitly stated. Infrastructure based on KVM (Kernel-based Virtual Machine) on Google Cloud Platform.
